Digital Archive • v2.0

EST. 2025 • MISSION CONTROL

Sagheer
Akram making code feel a bit more human.

I’m a student researcher spent on the intersection of AI, code, and nature. Currently in the thick of the matriculation season 2026.

Enter the Archive Identity Log

• IDENTITY LOG

A student researcher building at the intersection of logic and creativity.

I don't just "code"—I engineer experiences. My fascination lies in how AI can be woven into the fabric of daily workflows, making them more intuitive and powerful without losing the human core.

When I'm not in the terminal, you'll find me with a 70-200mm lens, capturing the quiet moments in nature that code can't replicate. This "Live Lab" is my mission control for all experiments.

AI Logic Integrating LLMs
Architecture Building Systems
Visual Arts Lens Narratives
Research Deep Exploration

Human-AI Collaboration Stack.
